summary: First test run of KrishkAI farming assistant app. Backend: 100% pass rate (16/16 tests). Frontend: Core flows working, minor testID detection issues in 2 tabs. Fixed critical auth header bug.

minor.issue: JWT_SECRET hardcoded in server.py instead of .env file
JWT HMAC key is 24 bytes (recommended: 32 bytes for SHA256)

integration_issues.issue: testIDs for camera/gallery buttons not detected by Playwright, but tab navigation works and screen renders correctly
testIDs for chat input/quick prompts not detected by Playwright, but tab navigation works and screen renders correctly

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: style.resizeMode is deprecated, should use props.resizeMode
Deprecation warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents
Deprecation warning: shadow* style props deprecated, use boxShadow

action_items: Consider moving JWT_SECRET to .env file for better security
Investigate why Detect and Chat tab testIDs are not detected by Playwright (may need longer wait times or different selectors)
Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
Consider increasing JWT_SECRET length to 32+ bytes
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded with {_id: 0} in all queries
✅ All endpoints use Pydantic models for input validation
✅ Frontend uses testID attributes extensively for testing
✅ API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
✅ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ Proper error handling in API calls
⚠️ No frontend validation for numeric inputs before parsing
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (Fixed auth header issue - changed from query param to Header)

success_rate.frontend: 85% (Core flows working, 2 minor testID detection issues)

seed_data_creation: Test user already exists: phone=9876543210, password=test123. Additional test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional with all AI integrations working (GPT-4o via Emergent). Frontend core flows tested and working. The Detect and Chat tabs navigate correctly but Playwright had issues detecting some testIDs - this may be a timing issue or the elements render after initial page load. Main agent should verify these two screens load correctly in actual usage. Auth header bug was fixed - backend now properly uses Authorization header instead of query parameter.

bugs_fixed.bug: Backend auth endpoints expected Authorization token as query parameter instead of header
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed get_current_user() and auth endpoints to use Header() dependency from FastAPI
bugs_fixed.verification: All auth tests now pass (test_get_profile previously failing, now passing)

ai_integration_status.crop_recommendation: ✅ Working - GPT-4o returns structured JSON with crop suggestions
ai_integration_status.disease_detection: ✅ Working - GPT-4o analyzes images and returns disease info
ai_integration_status.knowledge_hub_chat: ✅ Working - GPT-4o responds to farming questions
